form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr2) over 2130m at this track beaten 22 m by Troubadour (2:34.40) in NR 65 to 75 on March 17 at $21. Before that, 4th (Fr2) over 2130m at this track beaten 11 m by Wall Street Girl (2:34.30) in 4yo+ NR 60 to 69 on March 6 at $7.50. Draws the pegs so expect a better effort.
